subject: Cinyanja
coverageNote: Form directories exist only where teaching-module source PDFs were ingested. Missing forms must resolve as known-gap, not empty objects.

lesson.title: Zocita-Exercise
topics: Phunziloli linena za Litilica. Litilica idziwika mosiyana-siyana kulingana ndi alembi
osiyana-siyana. Ngakhale lidziwika kuti Litilica, imafalitsidwa mnjila zosiyana-
siyana kupyolela m’nyimbo, masewelo, ndakatulo, miyambi, mikuluwiko ndi
zilapi (ndagi). Izi maka-maka zigwela m’mbali ziwili zimene zili mu zolembedwa
